version_description: All lyrics with accompanying chords. Full chord legend included. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Oa_RSwwpPaA.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: Beautiful things
Artist: Benson Boone
Composers: Benson Boone,
           Jackson Lafrantz Larsen & Evan Blair
Album: Fireworks and rollerblades

Tabbed by DJ  8th April 2025

CAPO: 1st fret
(Song will then sound in the recorded key of Eb)

I would suggest using the voicings in the text
column numbers below.
Regarding the CHORD BOX DIAGRAMS please follow the
information at the very bottom of the page.

Chord names & fret positions are relative to the capo
Dsus2 = xx0230    A       = x02220    D5  = x577xx
D     = xx0232    Fdim7/B = x2313x    A5  = 577xxx
E     = 022100    Bm11    = x20220    E5  = 022xxx
F#m   = 244222                        F#5 = 244xxx
 
N.C. = No chords   ^ = Emphasise the beats

Please take a second to scroll down to the bottom of
the page and select a star rating for my tab, thanks
=====================================================
[Intro] (See riff tablature near bottom of page)
[tab]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]     N.C.
| /  /__/  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
For a while there it was rough,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
But lately, I've been doing better...[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
Than the last four cold De - cembers I re - call,[/tab]
[tab]N.C.         [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
And I see my fam - ily every month,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
I found a girl my parents love,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
She'll come and stay the night,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]    N.C.
And I  ...think I might have it all[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And I thank God every day...[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Fdim7/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
...For the girl he sent my  way,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
But I know the things he gives me,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
He can take a- way and I hold you every night,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
And that's a feeling I wanna get used to,[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                 [ch]Bm11[/ch] N.C.
      But there's no man  as terrified...[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]   N.C.
As the man who stands to lose--- you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]                      [ch]E5[/ch]              [ch]F#5[/ch]
       Oh -oo hoh, I hope I don't losе you,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]          [ch]A5[/ch]        [ch]E5[/ch]    [ch]F#5[/ch]
Mmm, ...please,  ...stay,  ...I want you, I need you,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]         [ch]A5[/ch]
Oh, God, don't   ...take...[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    N.C.             [ch]D[/ch]
  ...Thеse beautiful things that I've got![/tab]
                                      ^ ^ ^
[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Please,      ...stay,      I want you, I need you,[/tab]
        ^ ^ ^
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]      N.C.    [ch]A[/ch]      N.C.
Oh, God,   don't       ...take...[/tab]
    ^ ^ ^         ^ ^ ^
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
  ...Thеse beautiful things that I've got,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]    N.C.
Oh - oh - oh, hoh, oh, oh!    oo - oo, oo![/tab]
[tab]N.C.    [ch]A[/ch]    N.C.  [ch]E[/ch]    N.C.
Please,   ...don't take...[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I found my mind, I'm feeling sane,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's been a while but I'm finding my faith,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
If everything's good and it's great,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Why do I sit and wait 'til it's gone?[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
   Oh, I'll tell you, I know I've got e - nough,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Fdim7/B[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I've got peace and I've got love,[/tab]
         ^         ^        ^
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
But I'm up at night...[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]            N.C.
Thinking I just might lose it all------![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       N.C.      [ch]A[/ch]
        Please,       ...stay, [/tab]
^ ^ ^             ^ ^ ^
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
       I want you, I need you![/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]      N.C.   [ch]A[/ch]     N.C.
Oh, God,   don't     ...take...[/tab]
    ^ ^ ^        ^ ^ ^
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
   ...Thеse beautiful things that I've got,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]   N.C.
Oh, oh, oh, hoh, oh, oh!     Hoo - oo, oo![/tab]
                             ^     ^   ^
[tab]N.C.    [ch]A[/ch]    N.C.  [ch]E[/ch]   N.C.
Please,  ... stay,          I want you, I need you,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       N.C.  [ch]A[/ch]   N.C
Oh, God, ...I      ...need...[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]   N.C.
    These beautiful things that I've got[/tab]

[tab]=====================================================
[Intro]   (Relative to the capo)
   Dsus2   D   A           E
e|-------0-h2----------|---------------------|
B|------------------2--|---------------------|
G|--2--2---------------|---------------------|
D|--0----------2-2-----|--------b6-----------|
A|-------------0-------|--2--2---------------|
E|---------------------|--0------------------|[/tab]

 h = hammer-on note
 b = bend up a semi-tone then release back again

=====================================================
For the GUITAR chord box diagrams to match my
suggested choices you need to manually select the
following choice of options by clicking on the
forward/backward arrows below five of the diagrams.
 Fdim7/B      D5         A5         E5        F#5
<6 of 11>  <5 of 12>  <4 of 13>  <2 of 17>  <2 of 9>

The remaining chord boxes can be the default first
option and don't need any reselecting. As long as you
are logged into your account, these choices will be
saved automatically for every time you view this tab
